title: Lucky's Wardrobe
description: A mod that adds functional cosmetic clothes into the game
body:
![Cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73c2dc85d57e79f75d7b2fe0a2e01e279c49cc9e.png)![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f027902344b2c872204514d43d79e51b79646fd0_0.webp)![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdb361ba6170b006cf60305356e65507d030081c_0.webp)![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba874b9d3e7cee56ee6285abc2b667fa4cf13a1d_0.webp)![5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f813f1a576b5ef8972a18cc7b70c64026ad2d29c.png)![6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9c0bc3a225f3c0a4655cbe81d6ff766fdcb4064.png)

Translation:

Wardrobe is a mod that aims to expand upon personality and immersion in Minecraft. The mod adds tons of new cosmetic items that are not only for looks but also have functionality. From winter coats and scarves that protect you from cold environments (Tough as Nails), different backpacks for extra storage options, even some accessory items that emit light to help see in the dark, much much more!!!
